steps.title: Compute b as 80% less than 36
steps.content:
• 80% less than 36 means subtract 80% of 36 from 36.
  • $$b = 36 - 0.80 \times 36 = 36(1-0.80) = 36 \times 0.20 = 7.2$$

steps.title: Compute a as 120% greater than b
steps.content:
• 120% greater than b means add 120% of b to b.
  • $$a = b + 1.20b = b(1+1.20) = 2.20b = 2.20 \times 7.2 = 15.84$$
  • The answer is 15.84.
